title: IndabaX Kenya 2026 Registration Now Open!
excerpt: We're excited to announce that registration for IndabaX Kenya 2026 is now live. Early bird spots are limited - register today to secure your place at East Africa's premier AI conference.
content: Registration for IndabaX Kenya 2026 is officially open! Join us March 15-17, 2026 at the Kenyatta International Convention Centre for three days of cutting-edge AI research, workshops, and networking.
author: IndabaX Kenya Team

title: Announcing Our 2026 Keynote Speakers
excerpt: Meet the incredible lineup of keynote speakers for IndabaX Kenya 2026. From NLP experts to healthcare AI pioneers, our speakers represent the best of African AI research.
content: We're thrilled to announce our keynote speakers for IndabaX Kenya 2026...
author: Program Committee

title: Call for Papers: Deadline Extended to Feb 15
excerpt: Great news! We've extended the paper submission deadline to February 15, 2026. Submit your AI research to be presented at IndabaX Kenya.
content: Due to popular demand, we're extending the call for papers deadline...
author: Research Committee

title: 10+ Hands-On Workshops Announced
excerpt: From deep learning fundamentals to advanced NLP, we're offering 10+ practical workshops. Check out the full schedule and register for your favorites.
content: Workshop registration is now open! Choose from 10+ hands-on sessions...
author: Workshop Committee

title: Sponsor Spotlight: Google AI
excerpt: Learn about our platinum sponsor Google AI and their commitment to advancing AI research and education in Africa.
content: We're honored to have Google AI as a platinum sponsor...
author: Partnerships Team

title: Highlights from IndabaX Kenya 2024
